title: Acquiring Leads and Driving Conversion
content:
Led acquisition campaigns across channels:

1. FB Ads

sent 1000 visitors to landing page for $1.80 each
doubled leadgen conversion (2.5% to 5%) through A/B testing 

2. SMS: 2% conversion 

3. Email: 

1.5% open rate
20% CTR
37% CTA
2% convert to lead

4. Direct mail: 

acquired a handful of customers from postcard campaign

title: How I use AI
content: I use AI through every phase of product work. I use Perplexity and Gemini for research and data analysis. I use GPT to critique and refine reasoning, strategy, and scope. I prototype solutions and design ideas directly in ClaudeCode and Cursor. MCP allows me to interact with BE systems for data analysis and bug fixing. I've created an automated workflow for AI code review with deployment to staging and production. I've built my own evals dashboard and tools for managing user progress from onboarding to activation. I use feature feature flags to segment releases and behavioral analytics to measure adoption.

title: Overview
content: Aurora Solar is a B2B SaaS platform powering 80% of US residential solar designs. As a founding product manager, I led a platform rebuild to execute a land-and-expand strategy that helped the company scale from Series A to C. I introduced beta testing, behavioral analytics, and product-led onboarding to improve launch speed and adoption. I led foundational improvements to increase alignment and product quality, including: a common prioritization framework, cross-silo reporting, and v1 design system. These efforts helped Aurora capture the majority of the U.S. installer market and reach a $4B valuation.

title: B2B Marketing for Field Service Lightning and Service Cloud
content: As Product Strategist at Salesforce I refined buyer + user personas and restructured information architecture for marketing Field Service Lightning (FSL) and Service Cloud. I shifted landing page strategy from lengthy lists of features to instead answer three fundamental customer questions: a) What is this? b) Why does it matter? c) What does it cost? This approach improved user comprehension and top of funnel conversion, accelerating buyer readiness and driving measurable sales outcomes.
role_title: Product Lead | Product Strategist | Head of Design

title: Mobile-first strategy for salesforce.com
content: As a Product Strategist for Salesforce I worked across Digital UX, Strategy, and Leadership teams to deliver a mobile-first strategy to improve UX for 3.5M users of salesforce.com. I used heuristic review, landscape analysis, and segmentation of website traffic to develop novel insights on mobile prospects based on user, behavior, and device analytics. I developed guiding principles, components, and prototypes with a phased plan for delivery. One quarter of focused work resulted in cross-functional alignment on bold shifts in content strategy, user experience and information architecture. Mobile improvements became a "top 5" initiative for FY 2019, with revised mobile strategy projected to achieve 25% of targeted growth.
role_title: Product Lead | Product Strategist | Head of Design

title: FalconX: $8B blockchain unicorn
content: As Head of Design for seed-stage FalconX, I designed a v1 crypto exchange and wallet. Working closely with founders and advisors (Accel, Lightspeed), I led discovery and persona development. I hired and managed a team of 6 (O/M Studio) to deliver branding and functional prototypes. I organized in-person and unmoderated usability testing to validate and refine product direction. Then worked with internal engineers, providing front-end specs and code to develop a responsive web app for crypto trading. Finally, I developed marketing website and collateral to support initial go-to-market strategy.
role_title: Product Lead | Product Strategist | Head of Design

title: Building with AI: strategy, design, coding and GTM
content:
I built Narrata to help PMs navigate career transitions. This began as a project for learning and fun. Based on interest and demand I committed to building a complete product.

I started with discovery, market sizing and concept testing. Next I developed a complete functional prototype to demonstrate and think through how the product would work. I then measured interest and engagement through behavioral analytics and qualitative feedback. Over 200 people have already tried Narrrata!

Narrata MVP accepts resume and cover letter as inputs. Extracts work history, cover letter template and a modular story library. Additional features include: gap analysis, PM level assessment and human-in-the-loop content creation. 

Narrata provides a structured workflow for creating cover letters. Paste a job description and to assemble a draft based on your existing approved content. Then we flag gaps and human + LLM work together to create variations which are tagged and saved for future re-use.

title: Rebuilt flagship product for customer support
content: As Senior Manager at Samsung Research America, I led a team of 6 to reimagine customer care for 20M users after the recall of 1M devices. I shipped emergency features like an IMEI checker and FAQs. Once customers were informed and safe, I launched new support channels including SMS and video chat. Then I delivered a complete UX overhaul, including new diagnostics and personalized content. Finally, I helped roll-out a nationwide extended warranty, our first revenue-generating feature. Results: 160% growth in monthly active users, a 200% increase in engagement, and an improved Google Play Store rating from 3.7 to 4.3.

title: Product analytics to modernize launch and onboarding
content: As Senior PM at Aurora Solar I led a multi-year platform rebuild to support a land-and-expand strategy and shift up-market. I introduced beta testing, behavioral analytics, and product-led onboarding to improve launch speed and adoption. This initiative included personalized guides and surveys, cross-silo reporting and connecting analytics infrastructure to other tools and teams.

title: Implemented product-led growth strategy for 0-1
content: As VP of Product at Enact Systems, I led a cross-functional team from 0-1 to improve home energy management. I established product vision working across leadership, subject matter experts, and business partners. I directed roadmapping, provided monthly updates in our global all-hands, and worked directly with investors and board members. I organized 30+ user interviews and a statewide survey to define value propositions. I designed a financial model supporting subscription services, transactions, and marketplace. I delivered a responsive web app, mobile app and white label versions of each. These efforts grew our user base 10X, increased monthly active users 620% and drove revenue growth of 169%.

title: Product strategy and GTM to drive revenue and user growth
content: As Co-Founder of SpatialThink, I led product strategy and GTM for a mixed reality platform that addressed the costs and difficulties of scaling skilled trades training. I led discovery to identify pain points and common needs across training orgs, facilities maintenance teams, and construction firms. We then built a minimum viable product in under six months using Web3D and reality capture technology. These efforts allowed us to secure an anchor customer with 400K members, onboard 100+ users from 30+ organizations and generate $300K in pilot revenue using a hybrid SaaS and services model.

title: Meta: increase AI/ML adoption
content: As Product Lead at Meta I worked to improve adoption of ML tools to enhance productivity of internal teams. I conducted 24 user interviews that revealed fragmented workflows and a lack of trust in ML recommendations. I led a design sprint to address unmet user needs, developing dashboards, explainable AI and a "copilot" mode. This strategic pivot to increase transparency resulted in a 130% increase in feature usage within 30 days, and a 10X lift in usage by end of year.
role_title: Product Lead | Product Strategist | Head of Design

title: Processes to scale, increase product quality
content: As Senior PM at Aurora Solar I led the introduction of design sprints and prototype testing to enhance product quality and streamline development. I also implemented our v1 design system for consistent UX, and automated bug reporting to identify and resolve issues more efficiently. These initiatives strengthened our product overall and fostered a culture of continuous improvement, improving agile processes and team culture.

title: Led end-to-end chatbot design
content: As Senior Manager at Samsung Research America, I led a team of 6 to deliver end-to-end strategy and design for Samsung's first chatbot. The recall of 1M+ Note7 phones motivated Samsung to invest in support that could scale to millions of users, combining automation and human assistance. Core functionality included: 1) device + issue identification, 2) self-service options, and 3) instant community-based support with seamless hand-off to a Samsung support rep. I started with discovery, including generative research via panel interviews and surveys. Then developed multiple concepts for usability testing. In parallel, I worked with teams across the US and Korea to develop engineering specs, information architecture and content strategy. When rolled out, the chatbot reduced response times 25X and decreased support costs by 60% per contact, improved customer satisfaction by 80%, and served as a global reference model for Samsung digital care.

title: Unified roadmap and phased rollout for platform rebuild
content: As Senior PM at Aurora Solar I introduced a unified roadmap to accelerate feature delivery and implemented a common framework to align prioritization across 5 pods. This initiative improved collaboration and coordination across engineering, design, customer success, and product marketing teams. Using persona-based development and phased rollout allowed us to reduce time to market, align product work to company OKRs and ensure features were based on customer needs as reported by GTM teams.
